case_title: DONALD KUNG VS. KEVIN VICTOR MONTAGUE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2021 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-24-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DONALD KUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEVIN VICTOR MONTAGUE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SUBMITS HIS PROOF OF SERVICE TO THE CLERK FOR FILING IN OPEN COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS FILED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. MATTER IS CONTINUED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DONALD KUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEVIN VICTOR MONTAGUE IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. . COURT STATES THAT SHE HAS RECEIVED THE REQUESTED EMAIL INFORMATION FROM DEFENDANT FROM THE LAST HEARING ON MARCH 24, 2021 RE: CONTCT INFORMATION FOR MR STEVEN MAZZIO AND MR. MAZZIO'S APPRAISAL. COURT STATES THAT MR. MAZIO WAS CONTACTED AND HIS STATEMENT/TESTIMONY RE: HIS APPRAISL IS TAKEN. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE THE REQUESTED EMAIL INFORMATION FOR MR. GILBERT BY PLAINTIFF. THE REQUESTED INFORMATION IS AGAIN EMAIL TO DEPARTMENT506@SFTC.ORG. THE REQUESTED INFORMATION IS RECEIVED. COURT STATES THAT SHE WILL CONTACT MR. GILBERT AND THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-31-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-01-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK, (506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2021 - JUDGMENT. MATTER PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON APRIL 19, 2021.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUNG, DONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONTAGUE, KEVIN VICTOR MATTER PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON APRIL 19, 2021. **SEE ATTACHED MC-025** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF FORM SC-104 FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, DONALD SERVED FEB-04-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTAGUE, KEVIN VICTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KUNG, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT MONTAGUE, KEVIN VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-10-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DONALD KUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEVIN VICTOR MONTAGUE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $85.00 SERVED FEB-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONTAGUE, KEVIN VICTOR
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO CURE UNTIMELY FILED PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO MARCH 24, 20201 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPARTMENT 506.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF DONALD KUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEVIN VICTOR MONTAGUE IS PRESENT. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG ORDERS DONALD KUNG AND KEVIN MONTAGUE TO EMAIL HER AT DEPARTMENT506@SFTC.ORG BY 9:AM. MAR-25-2021. MR. KUNG IS TO SUBMIT GILBERT'S FULL NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION. MR. MONTAGUE IS TO SUBMIT CONTACT INFORMATION FOR MR. STEVEN MAZZIO AND PROVIDE THE COURT WITH MR. MAZZIO'S APPRAISAL. PARTIES ARE TO CC EACH OTHER WITH THAT INFORMATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
